subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-10-01
subcodes.first_line: I remember once in Tihran when I was a child, I was sitting by Aqa Siyyid Yahya Vahid
subcodes.first_line_orig: بخاطر دارم که طفل بودم در طهران در بیرونی در جنب حضرت وحید یعنی جناب آقا سید یحیی
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @call to action, @stories; anecdotes, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
